Gold nugget

Gold nugget
Type: Material
Value: 8
Fine Value: 39
Keyword: Nugget
Properties:
Bankable:     Droppable:
Sellable:     Tradable:

Gold is one of the most valuable metals, often used in jewellery crafting.

The Gold nugget item is a material.

Contents

  • 1 Uses
    • 1.1 Recipe Ingredient
    • 1.2 Job Boards
    • 1.3 Achievement
  • 2 Sources

  • 4 Gear Sets
  • 5 Related Items
  • 6 Trivia

Uses

Recipe Ingredient

Gold nugget is an ingredient in the following recipe:

Item Name Service
Requirement 		Skills Materials
Used 		Recipe
Outputs
Smelt a gold bar Needs Basic Forge service or better. Smithing lvl. 15 7x Gold nugget or 2x Gold ore 1x Gold bar

Job Boards

Gold nugget can be requested from the following job:

Job Board Name Location Quantity Item Type Rewards
Everhaven combined job board Everhaven 7 +1  Erdwise Faction Reputation
1x   Smithing chest

Achievement

Gold nugget is needed for the following achievement:

Achievement Name Difficulty Requirement Rewards
Gold Digger Normal Gain Gold nugget from activities. [1,000] 3x achievement points
1000x coins

Sources

Activity Drops

Activity Name Skills Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.‡
Gold panning Mining lvl. 15
Fishing lvl. 5		 1-2 7.171% ~1 in 14 actions 651 steps 409 steps
Underwater aqueduct digging Mining lvl. 40 1-3 8.332% ~1 in 12 actions 600 steps 318 steps
Wreck diving Foraging lvl. 35
Agility lvl. 35		 5-10 13.483% ~1 in 7 actions 989 steps 550 steps

‡W.E.A.R is a value that shows the average steps for one item at maximum work efficiency.

Chest Drops

Chest Name Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Chest)† 		Odds
(Per Roll)
Trinketry chest 3-5 3.262% 12.423% ~1 in 8 chests
(~1 in 31 rolls)

†Note: Chests roll for loot multiple times.

Achievement Completion Reward

Achievement Name Quantity Requirement
Wow. 67 At least Trinketry lvl. 67.

Item Attribute Drop

Item Name Item Type Relevant Attributes
Golden chisel +7.5% Chance to find 1 Gold nugget While doing Carpentry.
+20% Chance to find 1 Gold nugget While doing Trinketry.

Ability Activation

Ability Name Effect Source Quantity Chance
(Per Roll) 		Chance
(Per Activation)† 		Odds
Present Rain Gives 5 random presents containing items. Reindeer 1-7 14.894% 55.352% ~1 in 2 actions

†Note: Abilities can roll for loot multiple times.

Material
